name: Welcome Home Chocolate Bars
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk (not evaporated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a 13 x 9 inch baking pan, melt the butter in the oven.
3. Sprinkle the crumbs evenly over the melted butter, pour the Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk evenly over the crumbs. Then top with the remaining ingredients and press down firmly.
4. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool. Cut into bars. Yield: 24 bars.
